# resizeRow

Resizes the row. Rows cannot be resized to be smaller than their minimum size.

Supported on:

*   [TableNode](/docs/plugins/api/TableNode/)

## Signature​

### resizeRow(rowIndex: number, height: number): void

## Parameters​

### height​

New width of the row. Must be `>= 0.01`
